pom.xml.general_idea: Changed the Maven groupId from com.github.piomin to pl.piomin to reflect a namespace migration.
Reset the project version to 1.0-SNAPSHOT for the new major release cycle.
Explicitly configured the project to target Java 11 via properties and compiler plugin.
Added explicit dependency on Spring Context to ensure compatibility with the new build structure.
Added explicit dependency on Spring Web to ensure compatibility with the new build structure.
Added explicit dependency on Logstash Logback Encoder for logging functionality.
Added explicit dependency on Servlet API 4.0.1, required for Java EE 8 / Jakarta EE 8 compatibility often associated with JDK 11 environments.
Added explicit dependency on Apache Commons IO for utility functions.
Added explicit dependency on SLF4J API for logging facade.
Added explicit dependency on javax.annotation-api to replace the module removed from the JDK in Java 11.
Configured the Maven compiler plugin to use the 'release' flag for cross-compilation support in Java 11.
Removed the multi-module structure, likely flattening the project or moving modules elsewhere.
